name: AoT College Life
description:
Attack on Titan Modern AU

Sequel to my "AoT Party on campus" bot. This time, you have a chance to study with the AoT cast in a college! Among other things, such as partying and living in a shared dormitory.

(Art by Chalseu)

There are only four professors for now (Erwin, Levi, Hange and Zeke). I will add more characters in the future. Sometimes, the bot may mistake some characters' appearance. Apologies for that. In this case, just edit the message

03.09.25 -- changed the initial message to suit the bot better and create the window for more creative role plays
creator: Prime123
